hyperedges.label: seed.js populates all Mongoose model collections in one script
DM and Player auth guards protect API routes via session checks
Campaign data flows: DEFAULT_CAMPAIGN_* → loadCampaign → CAMPAIGN → renderEvents
Spell slot system: CLASS_PRESETS → getSpellSlotsForLevel → loadSlotState → consumeSpellSlot
App startup chain: checkDMSession → loadReferenceData → loadCharState → initApp
Live session sync: DM save → socket emit → server relay → player receive → render
Dual persistence: localStorage write triggers API sync (DM only)

nodes.label: Item known field — player visibility control
nodes.norm_label: item known field — player visibility control

nodes.label: No ES modules (global scope, file:// compat)
nodes.norm_label: no es modules (global scope, file:// compat)
